title: Viral on Instagram
description: I have recorded a lot of video demos and product launches. This is the first one that went viral: 20k views and 600 likes.

title: Local Background Remover
description: Why pay subscriptions or credits to remove the backgrounds of your images? I created Local Background Remover to fix that. Pay once, use your computer's resources, and remove hundreds or thousands of images. My first product with revenue.

title: text0
description: Cursor for writers. Vercel Hackathon winner, 2025.

title: Opencoder
description: Like Claude Code apps, but works with any model. Run opencode in the cloud.

title: Peruvian Elections 2026 Bot
description: A focused bot for following Peru's 2026 election process and checking election-related updates without digging through official sites.
